name: scheduling-redemption-handler
description: Scheduling_Redemption_Handler — scheduling sub-phase D Task D4. The one-tap action-token redemption endpoint behind the WS-D3 schedule.myrecruiter.ai CloudFront distribution (Function URL origin). Maps the six §13.8 URL slugs to token purposes, validates + atomically one-time-redeems via shared/scheduling/tokens.js (§13.7), then either writes the §B10 session-context binding row + redirects the volunteer into chat (cancel/reschedule/recovery — token authenticates ENTRY only; the calendar op runs in-chat after confirm, WS-D6/D7) or renders a thin attendance acknowledgement (interviewer dispositions are TODO(E6)). Function URL + IAM + Terraform are the integrator's glue.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
